channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2162] Test failure on test suite replay-vbr, subtest test_1c
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for yujian <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/18c4232c-146d-11e2-af8d-52540035b04c.

Lustre Tag: v2_3_0_RC2
Lustre Build: http://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-b2_3/32
Distro/Arch: RHEL6.3/x86_64(server), RHEL5.8/x86_64(client)
Test Group: failover

The sub-test test_1c hung as follows:

== replay-vbr test 1c: open (non O_CREAT) does not checks versions =================================== 21:05:56 (1350014756)
Starting client: client-29vm5: -o user_xattr,acl,flock client-29vm3:client-29vm7:/lustre /mnt/lustre2
CMD: client-29vm5 mkdir -p /mnt/lustre2
CMD: client-29vm5 mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,acl,flock client-29vm3:client-29vm7:/lustre /mnt/lustre2
CMD: client-29vm5 PATH=/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/opt/iozone/bin:/opt/iozone/bin:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/mpi:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests/racer:/usr/lib64/lustre/../lustre-iokit/sgpdd-survey:/usr/lib64/lustre/tests:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils/gss:/usr/lib64/lustre/utils:/usr/lib64/openmpi/1.4-gcc/bin:/usr/kerberos/sbin:/usr/kerberos/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin: NAME=autotest_config sh rpc.sh set_default_debug \"vfstrace rpctrace dlmtrace neterror ha config ioctl super quota\" \" 0xffb7e3ff\" 32 
CMD: client-29vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.sync_permission=0
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.sync_permission=0
CMD: client-29vm7 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.lustre-MDT0000.commit_on_sharing=0
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.commit_on_sharing=0
CMD: client-29vm1.lab.whamcloud.com mkdir -p -m 755 /mnt/lustre/d0.replay-vbr/d1
CMD: client-29vm1.lab.whamcloud.com openfile -f O_RDWR:O_CREAT -m 0644 /mnt/lustre/d0.replay-vbr/d1/f.replay-vbr.1c
Succeed in opening file "/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-vbr/d1/f.replay-vbr.1c"(flags=O_RDWR, mode=644)
CMD: client-29vm7 sync; sync; sync
Filesystem           1K-blocks      Used Available Use% Mounted on
client-29vm3:client-29vm7:/lustre
                      14449456    746976  12968040   6% /mnt/lustre
CMD: client-29vm1.lab.whamcloud.com,client-29vm5,client-29vm6 f=/mnt/lustre/fsa-\$(hostname); mcreate \$f; rm \$f

Info required for matching: replay-vbr 1c
item.summary: Test failure on test suite replay-vbr, subtest test_1c

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Close old ticket that hasn't been seen in a long time.
